_comment: Template — copy to autviam_config.json and fill values. Schema version 2-claude-routing.
_nested_dispatch_help: Depth-governed recursive dispatch. Auto probes the runtime ceiling; on requires runtime_max_depth to be declared or detected.
_project_help: 'disable' (default) = no GitHub Project sync. Otherwise a board: "Project Name" (owner defaults to repo owner), or {"owner":"X","name":"..."} / {"owner":"X","number":N}.
